name: python3-patiencediff
title: python3-patiencediff
summary: diff implementation with balanced performance, output and implementation
description:
diff implementation with balanced performance, output and implementation
This package contains the implementation of the ``patiencediff`` algorithm, as
first described by Bram Cohen.
.
Like Python's ``difflib``, this module provides both a convience
``unified_diff`` function for the generation of unified diffs of text files as
well as a SequenceMatcher that can be used on arbitrary lists.
.
Patiencediff provides a good balance of performance, nice output for humans,
and implementation simplicity.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use patiencediff because diff implementation with balanced performance, output and implementation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use patiencediff as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `patiencediff [options] [args]` as documented upstream for patiencediff.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair patiencediff with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `patiencediff --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
